title: LCE Visual Accuracy
description: Improvements to the Legacy4J mod which adds more accuracy in terms of visuals.
body: # LCE Visual Accuracy [](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-minecraft) [](https://ko-fi.com/omoso) LCE Visual Accuracy is a Resource Pack which adds old textures from LCE to Java. ![2D beds in creative](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SbrRaWqO/images/1cc46ad41e8a30c2ab336ceb21c3d63d27907ab5_350.webp) # Features - 2D beds! - Classic LCE intro! - LCE water texture! - LCE splash texts! - LCE stars! (Special thanks to Cixon!) # Need a server? [![BisectHosting Partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d811a958c28645cf1007ccc3d90cb282921bf7f.webp)](https://bh.naomieow.xyz/raamviot50)
